description_long: This is a modern two-seater chaise with a striking blue upholstered seat and backrest, supported by a minimalist, open-frame structure made of light-colored wood. The seat and backrest are both thick and rectangular, providing a clean, geometric look with no visible seams or decorative elements. The armrests are formed by the wooden frame, extending parallel to the seat and connecting to the legs in a continuous, angular design. The backrest is tall and flat, matching the width of the seat and offering ample support. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the wooden frame providing both structural integrity and a contemporary aesthetic. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern blue-upholstered two-seater chaise with a light wood open-frame structure and angular armrests, offering a clean and contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide blue seat and backrest framed by light wood armrests on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the seat and backrest, as well as the rectangular wooden frame forming the armrest and leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid blue backrest and the continuous wooden frame, with no visible seams or decorations.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the geometric profile of the seat, backrest, and wooden frame.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, flat, and rectangular, extending the full width of the seat with no visible segmentation, curvature, or decorative elements. It is upholstered in solid blue fabric, providing a clean and modern appearance.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, formed by the continuous light wood frame that runs parallel to the seat and connects to the legs.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are integrated into the open rectangular wooden frame, straight and angular, with a light wood finish and no decorative elements. They provide a sturdy, minimalist base for the chaise.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid blue fabric with a smooth, untextured appearance and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two main cushions: one for the seat and one for the backrest, both attached and rectangular in shape, with no loose or layered cushions visible.
